items.name: apply
items.doc: Applies a validated `AppDsl` configuration to a live Slint window.

items.name: icons
items.doc: Fluent icon name-to-codepoint registry used for icon resolution.

items.name: ResolvedNav
items.doc: Nav item after icon-name resolution — holds the resolved codepoint string.

items.name: ResolvedToolbar
items.doc: Toolbar item after icon-name resolution — holds the resolved codepoint string.

items.name: AppDsl
items.doc:
Validated, sealed shell configuration.
Can only be constructed via `AppDsl::builder().build()`.
A pp ds l struct.

items.name: builder
items.signature: pub fn builder(title: impl Into<String>) -> AppDslBuilder
items.doc: Start building a new DSL configuration with the given window title.
